## Before Requesting

* [ ] I have checked [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)
  — this might already be planned
* [ ] I have searched existing issues
  — this might already be requested

---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

Example:

> "I always have to manually..."

---

## Proposed Solution

How would you like it to work?

---

## Which Phase Does This Fit?

* [ ] Phase 1 — AI Core Foundation
* [ ] Phase 2 — Memory System
* [ ] Phase 3 — RAG Engine
* [ ] Phase 4 — Tool Engine
* [ ] Phase 5 — Voice Assistant
* [ ] Phase 6 — Agent System
* [ ] Phase 7 — Web UI
* [ ] New Phase / Not sure

---

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

---

## Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, links, or anything else.
